Bash(# Search for sales/pipeline/funnel/outbound/SDR related skills in alirezarezvani repo
gh api repos/alirezarezvani/claude-skills/git/trees/main?recursive=1 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
keywords = ['sales', 'pipeline', 'funnel', 'outbound', 'sdr', 'bdr', 'revenue', 'lead', 'prospect', 'crm', 'forecast', 'quota', 'commission']
for item in data.get\('tree', []\):
    path = item['path'].lower\(\)
    if any\(k in path for k in keywords\) and 'SKILL.md' in item['path']:
        print\(item['path']\)
" 2>/dev/null)
